'''choyapaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:byssolitic|byssolitic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-y-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:byssolitic|byssolitic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| choyapaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:choyapithi|choyapithi]] || [[word:choyapiji|choyapiji]] || [[word:choyapishi|choyapishi]] || [[word:choyapiki|choyapiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:choyaputhuthu|choyaputhuthu]] || [[word:choyapujuju|choyapujuju]] || [[word:choyapushushu|choyapushushu]] || [[word:choyapukuku|choyapukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:choyaputhu|choyaputhu]] || [[word:choyapuju|choyapuju]] || [[word:choyapushu|choyapushu]] || [[word:choyapuku|choyapuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:choyapufthuf|choyapufthuf]] || [[word:choyapufjuf|choyapufjuf]] || [[word:choyapufshuf|choyapufshuf]] || [[word:choyapufkuf|choyapufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:choyapethe|choyapethe]] || [[word:choyapeje|choyapeje]] || [[word:choyapeshe|choyapeshe]] || [[word:choyapeke|choyapeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:choyapothotho|choyapothotho]] || [[word:choyapojojo|choyapojojo]] || [[word:choyaposhosho|choyaposhosho]] || [[word:choyapokoko|choyapokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:choyapotho|choyapotho]] || [[word:choyapojo|choyapojo]] || [[word:choyaposho|choyaposho]] || [[word:choyapoko|choyapoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:choyapofthof|choyapofthof]] || [[word:choyapofjof|choyapofjof]] || [[word:choyapofshof|choyapofshof]] || [[word:choyapofkof|choyapofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:choyapïfthïf|choyapïfthïf]] || [[word:choyapïfjïf|choyapïfjïf]] || [[word:choyapïfshïf|choyapïfshïf]] || [[word:choyapïfkïf|choyapïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:choyapïfthïfthïf|choyapïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:choyapïfjïfjïf|choyapïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:choyapïfshïfshïf|choyapïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:choyapïfkïfkïf|choyapïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:choyapïfthïf|choyapïfthïf]] || [[word:choyapïfjïf|choyapïfjïf]] || [[word:choyapïfshïf|choyapïfshïf]] || [[word:choyapïfkïf|choyapïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:choyapïfthïf|choyapïfthïf]] || [[word:choyapïfjïf|choyapïfjïf]] || [[word:choyapïfshïf|choyapïfshïf]] || [[word:choyapïfkïf|choyapïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:choyapæthæ|choyapæthæ]] || [[word:choyapæjæ|choyapæjæ]] || [[word:choyapæshæ|choyapæshæ]] || [[word:choyapækæ|choyapækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:choyapathatha|choyapathatha]] || [[word:choyapajaja|choyapajaja]] || [[word:choyapashasha|choyapashasha]] || [[word:choyapakaka|choyapakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:choyapatha|choyapatha]] || [[word:choyapaja|choyapaja]] || [[word:choyapasha|choyapasha]] || [[word:choyapaka|choyapaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:choyapafthaf|choyapafthaf]] || [[word:choyapafjaf|choyapafjaf]] || [[word:choyapafshaf|choyapafshaf]] || [[word:choyapafkaf|choyapafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:choyapasha|choyapasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:choyapshësha|choyapshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:choyaprosha|choyaprosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:choyapmusha|choyapmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:choyapyasha|choyapyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochoyapnkshësha|gochoyapnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochoyapnkrosha|gochoyapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochoyapnkmusha|gochoyapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochoyapnkyasha|gochoyapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:choyayapasha|choyayapasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:choyayapshësha|choyayapshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:choyayaprosha|choyayaprosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:choyayapmusha|choyayapmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:choyayapyasha|choyayapyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochoyayapnkshësha|gochoyayapnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochoyayapnkrosha|gochoyayapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochoyayapnkmusha|gochoyayapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochoyayapnkyasha|gochoyayapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:cheyæpasha|cheyæpasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:cheyæpshësha|cheyæpshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:cheyæprosha|cheyæprosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:cheyæpmusha|cheyæpmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:cheyæpyasha|cheyæpyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gocheyæpnkshësha|gocheyæpnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gocheyæpnkrosha|gocheyæpnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gocheyæpnkmusha|gocheyæpnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gocheyæpnkyasha|gocheyæpnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:choyfapasha|choyfapasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:choyfapshësha|choyfapshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:choyfaprosha|choyfaprosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:choyfapmusha|choyfapmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:choyfapyasha|choyfapyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochoyfapnkshësha|gochoyfapnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochoyfapnkrosha|gochoyfapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochoyfapnkmusha|gochoyfapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochoyfapnkyasha|gochoyfapnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
